title: Our Blog
subtitle: Stories, updates and learning insights from The Sensorium School.

posts.title: Welcome to Our Blog
posts.excerpt: We are starting this blog section to share meaningful updates, activities, and learning journeys from our community.

sections.heading: Why This Blog
sections.text: This space will help parents, students, and supporters stay connected with our day-to-day progress and important announcements.

sections.heading: What You Will See Here
sections.text: You will find activity highlights, student milestones, workshops, and expert guidance posts.
